real_interview.content: <synch>

IntroV4Confirmation (hi i'm ellie thanks for coming in today i was created to talk to people in a safe and secure environment i'm not a therapist but i'm here to learn about people and would love to learn about you i'll ask a few questions to get us started and please feel free to tell me anything your answers are totally confidential are you ok with this)
yes
okay_confirm (okay)
how_doingV (so how are you doing today)
i'm doing fine
thats_good (that's good)
where_originally (where are you from originally)
uh mexico
really (really)
when_LA (when did you move to l_a)
uh when i was young seven years old
often_backB (how often do you go back to your hometown)
i've been there like uh three or four times for vacation
compares_LA (how does it compare to l_a)
well it's uh less stressful i don't know if it's because i'm on vacation but
i feel more at peace over there than here
mhm (mhm)
why_LA (why did you move to l_a)
well my uh family moved down here for a better life uh that was my parents
like_about_LA (what are some things you really like about l_a)
mm just the weather and the different things that you could do you could be at the beach or you could go to the mountains different variety of things to do
yeah3 (yeah)
dont_like_LA (what are some things you don't really like about l_a)
the traffic and sometimes <somet> yeah basically the traffic and yeah that's one of the main things
see_mean (i see what you mean)
travel_shoes (i'm sure you can tell by my shoes i'm not much of a world explorer do you travel a lot)
not that much i been to new york and uh mexico only
cool3 (cool)
travel_changed (what do you enjoy about traveling)
uh just uh seeing new places and finding new locations you know something new
memorableB (what's one of your most memorable experiences)
like for a trip or
yeah3 (yeah)
well i've been to uh in mexico i've been to the pyramids of uh
i forgot what's it called in mexico city
and i like you know about uh finding about my ancient culture since i'm uh uh mexican from mayan aztec so i like to see different things like that
wow (wow)
thats_great (that's great)
study (what did you study at school)
well uh at school
well i did uh drop out but i came back and i'm trying to get back into it right now trying to learn uh graphic designs
hard_decision (how did you decide to do that)
well i started liking you know to take pictures doing different things and i like you know
uh going into business i like what the it entitles about
dream_job (what's your dream job)
i wanna have my own business either making web pages just be able to be free
and don't being relying on someone else just be able to have freedom for myself
uh_huh (uh huh)
shyoutgoing (do you consider yourself more shy or outgoing)
outgoing
why2 (why)
well i just like to you know
be around people like to get to know people and depending on the person how i feel around 'em
okay_confirm (okay)
relax_fishtank (sometimes when i'm feeling tense i turn on the fish tank screensaver hey i know it's not hawaii but it's the best i've got what do you do to relax)
i like to hear music or you know
do do different things like play sports or do different things just to unwind
control_temper (how are you at controlling your temper)
well i'm getting better at it
you know
i xxx
last_argument (when was the last time you argued with someone and what was it about)
well it was like uh
two days ago it was something about uh i needed to pay a bill or something <some> something that uh i you know i had taken care of
but the person he's like more picky about it you know he's more
that_sucks (that sucks)
you know how how girls are you know they they want everything right there and then
wild_laughter5 ((laughter))
i have it handled you know i have it everything there and they just bugging sometimes they don't give you the space
that you need to resolve something
yeah3 (yeah)
describe_felt (how did you feel in that moment)
well i felt like i was overwhelmed i already had it resolved i just was waiting for
a check you know that's not on my control but i already had made the paper proper arrangements and she's bugging me about it and it's like
you're making you know an argument you know a storm in a glass of water
mm (mm)
yeah3 (yeah)
it's like mhm
situation_handled (tell me about a situation that you wish you had handled differently)
well
uh differently there's couple of them but not so recently because i've been more
trying to get my life together but the decisions i made before in the past
like dropping out of school and doing other different things
mm
feelguilty (what's something you feel guilty about)
guilty not that much because
not really
not that i could think right off the top of my head
okay_confirm (okay)
hard_decisionB (tell me about the hardest decision you've ever had to make)
the hardest decision
oh it's just not on top of my head right now
okay_confirm (okay)
memory_erase (tell me about an event or something that you wish you could erase from your memory)
an event
mm well the only things that i remember is when i black out or different things like that that i don't remember
but
not nothing like a particular only when my uh brothers died and different things like that
mhm
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
well my brother was in gangs and different things and he was getting more into trouble
and it's just not a pleasant memory for me to talk about that much get into it
sorry_hear (i'm sorry to hear that)
family_relationship (tell me about your relationship with your family)
no i'm hispanic i you know i like to be with my family
and you know i i like to go over there to mexico too i have a half-sister and my grandpa died he was over there in mexico
so i do uh like to have a good relationship with my family
thats_good (that's good)
influence_positive (who's someone that's been a positive influence in your life)
well

my mom and dad they always work hard they always done what they had to do to pay the bills that's why sometimes i be like you know running around trying to get everythings done but done correctly not trying to take the easy way out
yeah3 (yeah)
difficult (how hard is that)
it's a little hard because there eh especially here in los angeles there's a lotta
different things that you could get into that's not that positive
and it's hard to stay focused on you know the correct stuff
uh_huh (uh huh)
easy_sleep (how easy is it for you to get a good night's sleep)
well normally i just knock out it's not that hard it's like it takes me like half an hour or fifteen minutes but
uh sometimes i can't even wake up even with the alarm
wild_laughter3 ((laughter))
uh they have to wake me up you know my girl has to wake me up even with the alarm going on it's like so
hard so you know i just knock out
sleep_affects (what are you like when you don't sleep well)
i do get a little either i'm angry or i don't feel good and i'm not filled with energy
but i still have to know i know i have to do something so i still go through with it
mm (mm)
feel_lately (how have you been feeling lately)
i been well i been uh feeling good you know
been a little restless but not that much i had to do stuff so
i just you know put myself to do it no matter how i feel
behavior_changes (have you noticed any changes in your behavior or thoughts lately)
no
nothing out of the ordinary
ptsd_diagnosed (have you ever been diagnosed with p_t_s_d)
no
depression_diagnosed (have you been diagnosed with depression)
no
happy_lasttime (tell me about the last time you felt really happy)
the last time i felt happy that was probably on the weekend that i was you know going out with a
going out have some fun and you know i was drinking and just relaxing
and winding <win> winding down
awesome (awesome)
mhm
ideal_weekendC (tell me how you spend your ideal weekend)
my ideal weekend is usually with my girl either out or at home just relax
but nothing else you know just be able to relax and unwind with her you know either going out somewhere to a nice place or staying at home
but without getting any calls or xxx interruptions you know just be able to turn off the phone and turn off everything just
be with her doing the other different things
yeah3 (yeah)
mhm
BF_describe (how would your best friend describe you)
uh like an outgoing guy you know very social but at the same time i'm reserved depending how i feel with people
have to you know build trust or feel comfortable with them
uh_huh (uh huh)
self_change (what are some things you wish you could change about yourself)
oh i'm changing a lot you know like
uh my temper and different things drinking things i'm
changing a little different things so i could get more different things done
feelbadly (tell me about a time when someone made you feel really badly about yourself)
oh there's several but mostly uh
is when i'm coming from mexico that they wanna demeander you even down there it feels uh like silly because i went to a store i was regularly dressed
and i was telling 'em i wanted to buy something and then they said that
that i i wasn't belong there and i and as soon as they saw my credit card they kinda changed perspective because they saw the wells fargo logo they know i was american
wild_laughter3 ((laughter))
but they thought it was like you know

it it was <wa> it felt me it felt ridiculous to me because you go to a place and you have the money you ask for something you're gonna ask for something because you have it not just to waste <wa> kill their time
yeah3 (yeah)
just because they saw a logo of a card
that's how they you know
it just it was ridiculous for me
understand (i understand)
regret (is there anything you regret)
no
advice_back (what advice would you give to yourself ten or twenty years ago)
basically uh to stay more focused on different things uh stay in school
and you know don't go you know try to control my temper and do different things because if i knew what i know now back then it'd be different
mm (mm)
Ellie17Dec2012_08 (what are you most proud of in your life)
well uh i did drop out but i did uh go back to school and i you know i did get my high school
and right now i'm in the process of doing other different things so right now is uh getting my high school getting that together
and right now i'm working to another goal trying to get you know my either going back to school so it's basically <ba> basically getting back to school and finishing the high school the g_e_d
good_hear (that's so good to hear)
mhm
asked_everything (okay i think i have asked everything i need to)
appreciate_open (thanks for sharing your thoughts with me)
okay
you're welcome
bye (goodbye)
bye
